tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def linear-by-id (into {} (map (juxt :id identity) linear-issues)))
(defn linear-state [id] (get-in linear-by-id [id :state]))
(->> prs-with-linear
     (map (fn [pr] {:pr (:number pr) :linear (:closes_linear pr) :state (linear-state (:closes_linear pr))}))
     (filter #(not= "done" (:state %)))
     (sort-by :pr))"}
